name: AppBuilder App MCP Server
description: This server provides MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools for interacting with Baidu AppBuilder applications. It supports both stdio and SSE (Server-Sent Events) protocols.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all available AppBuilder applications.

tools.name: create_conversation
tools.description: Create a new conversation session for a specific AppBuilder application.

app_id.description: The unique identifier of the target application

tools.name: run
tools.description: Execute a conversation query with a specific AppBuilder application.

app_id.description: The unique identifier of the target application

query.description: The input text/query to send to the application

authorization.name: api_key
authorization.description: Requires an AppBuilder API key in the format 'bce-v3/ALTAK-...'. Get your API key from: https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/AppBuilder/s/klv2eywua
